patch.value: Stop listing provided --flag as missing in error recovery bundle

When a flag was provided but its value rejected (e.g. malformed --reminder value), the recovery bundle reported the flag as 'missing: --reminder' and 'suggested_retry' was an identical command. Now filter inferredMissing to exclude flags that were already provided.
Recovery bundle for malformed --reminder no longer claims --reminder is missing; suggested_retry only repeats the original command if no other recovery hint exists.
